bug.description: missing error propagation where a failure is silently ignored

prompt:
There is a missing error propagation where a failure is silently ignored downstream of function LL_RTC_ExitInitMode in the targets/TARGET_STM/TARGET_STM32F3 subsystem.
The function is located at targets/TARGET_STM/TARGET_STM32F3/STM32Cube_FW/STM32F3xx_HAL_Driver/stm32f3xx_ll_rtc.c:781.
Please investigate and fix this issue.
